mapper.select: SELECT v.* FROM volume v JOIN tree t ON v.tree_id = t.tree_id WHERE t.plot_id = #{plotId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO volume (tree_id, measured_volume, measure_date) VALUES (#{treeId}, #{measuredVolume}, #{measureDate})
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(v.measured_volume), 0) FROM volume v JOIN tree t ON v.tree_id = t.tree_id JOIN plot p ON t.plot_id = p.plot_id WHERE p.region_id = #{regionId}
